name: input
title: Input
description: Text/number input base with focus ring and aria-invalid styling.

props.name: type
props.description: Native input type (text, number, email, tel, date…).

props.name: aria-invalid
props.description: Applies the destructive error ring and border.

props.name: ...props
props.description: All native input attributes pass through.

notes: Foundational form primitive; ported from petals_ui unchanged (brand-neutral already).
